input.user_prompt: Make the background transparent. After that, make her hair clip(s) purple instead of pink, while keeping the shading the same, and make her hair a darker brown, also keeping the shading on the hair the same.

available_tools.name: new_document
available_tools.summary: Replace the current document with a new empty canvas.

background_color.description: Color as #RRGGBB, #RRGGBBAA, or [r, g, b, a] floats in [0, 1].

document_id.description: Document ID. Usually generated or preserved by the kernel. Optional; generated by the kernel when omitted.

description.description: Short human-readable reason for this action.

metadata.description: Optional planner metadata. Avoid private reasoning.

available_tools.name: import_image_as_layer
available_tools.summary: Import a raster image file as a new full-canvas layer.

path.description: Filesystem path to an image readable by Pillow.

name.description: Layer name. Defaults to the filename stem.

set_active.description: Whether to make the imported layer active.

output_layer_id.description: Output layer ID. Optional; generated by the kernel when omitted.

description.description: Short human-readable reason for this action.

metadata.description: Optional planner metadata. Avoid private reasoning.

action_batch.user_prompt: Make the background transparent. After that, make her hair clip(s) purple instead of pink, while keeping the shading the same, and make her hair a darker brown, also keeping the shading on the hair the same.
action_batch.description: Remove background alpha, recolor clips purple and hair darker brown while preserving luminance.

actions.description: Slightly grow and soften the background edge.
Clean and slightly soften the hair recolor mask.
Colorize the selected hair brown while preserving luminance.
Select light pink clip highlight pixels.
Select additional light pink clip pixels.
Colorize the selected clips purple while preserving luminance.
